highlights.description: Lou (Morphling) secures a decisive kill on an enemy hero, marking the beginning of an unstoppable killing spree that dominates the battlefield.
highlights.ai_insight: Lou's rampage redefines momentum, turning the tide with unmatched aggression and precision.

highlights.description: Lou (Weaver) delivers a relentless, high-impact performance, securing multiple consecutive kills with precise positioning and devastating abilities during a pivotal team fight.
highlights.ai_insight: Lou's rampage shifts momentum, turning a chaotic team fight into a decisive victory and electrifying the audience.

highlights.description: Lou's Morphling secures five consecutive kills in a decisive push, overwhelming the enemy team with relentless aggression and precise positioning.
highlights.ai_insight: This rampage shifts momentum entirely, turning a close fight into a psychological blow that demoralizes the opposition.

highlights.description: Lou (Morphling) executes a devastating solo kill on a high-value enemy hero, showcasing unmatched mobility and precision during a critical team fight.
highlights.ai_insight: This rampage defines dominance, turning the tide by eliminating a key threat mid-fight, silencing the opposition's momentum.

highlights.description: Lou (Weaver) eliminates five consecutive enemy heroes in quick succession, showcasing unmatched aggression and precision during a pivotal team fight.
highlights.ai_insight: This moment defines Lou's dominance, turning the tide of the match with a godlike display of mechanical mastery and fearless positioning.

highlights.description: Lou (Weaver) secures a decisive kill on an enemy hero, triggering a 'RAMPAGE!' banner and solidifying his dominance in the ongoing team fight.
highlights.ai_insight: This 'RAMPAGE!' moment shifts momentum, showcasing Weaver's peak mechanical skill and turning the tide in a high-stakes clash.

highlights.description: Lou (Weaver) delivers a relentless killing spree, eliminating multiple enemies in quick succession with precise skill usage and positioning.
highlights.ai_insight: This moment defines Lou's dominance, turning the tide with unmatched aggression and precision under pressure.

highlights.description: Lou (Weaver) executes a relentless assault through the forest, eliminating multiple enemies in quick succession, culminating in a 'RAMPAGE!' in-game announcement.
highlights.ai_insight: This moment establishes Weaver as a dominant force, shifting momentum and energizing the audience with high-stakes, skill-driven aggression.
